text.title: North Star Metric Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the `decision-record` artefact this methodology produces. Validator at scripts/validate-north-star-metric.py enforces the contract.

example.code: { "slug": "north-star-metric", "context": "Team operates multiple growth experiments without a shared NSM.", "decision": "Adopt weekly active teams completing >= 1 project as the NSM.", "consequences": [ "acquisition optimizes for sticky teams", "marketing campaigns measure projects-per-team" ], "owner": "head of growth", "date": "2026-05-23" }

section.title: Forbidden patterns
section.pattern: Artefact MUST NOT omit `owner` — orphan artefacts violate rule `named-owner`.
Artefact MUST NOT include keys outside the schema — `additionalProperties: false` is binding.
Artefact MUST NOT contain forbidden placeholder tokens in any string value (validator rejects them).
